OR_glioma.description: Odds ratio and 95% confidence interval for glioma associated with cellular telephone use (>100 hours)

OR_meningioma.description: Odds ratio and 95% confidence interval for meningioma associated with cellular telephone use (>100 hours)

OR_acoustic_neuroma.description: Odds ratio and 95% confidence interval for acoustic neuroma associated with cellular telephone use (>100 hours)

OR_all_tumors.description: Odds ratio and 95% confidence interval for all intracranial tumor types combined associated with cellular telephone use (>100 hours); the answer explicitly references this point estimate of 1.0 and notes all CIs include 1

cellular_telephone_use.value: Exposed if reported cellular telephone use for more than 100 hours
cellular_telephone_use.description: Exposure variable indicating whether the subject used a cellular telephone for more than 100 hours
